CONTENT.Club career: In May 2021, VfL Bochum, newly promoted to the Bundesliga, announced the signing of Antwi-Adjei for the 2021–22 season. He signed a contract until 2024 and joined on a free transfer from SC Paderborn.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 27 May 2024As of match played 14 June 2022
CONTENT.International career: Antwi-Adjei made his debut for Ghana national team on 18 November 2019 in an AFCON qualifier against São Tomé and Príncipe.

SUMMARY: Christopher Antwi-Adjei (born 7 February 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or left winger. Born in Germany, Antwi-Adjei represents the Ghana national team.
